results.title: Marco Rubio India Visit: U.S. Secretary of State Arrives in Kolkata to Kickstart Four-Day Visit
results.description: Marco Rubio starts his four-day India trip from Kolkata, where he is scheduled to visit Mother House. Later in his trip he will catch up with Prime Minister Narendra Modi to discuss trade, technology and defence. He will also be a part of the QUAD Foreign Ministers' Meeting. The post Marco Rubio India Visit: U.S. Secretary of State Arrives in Kolkata to Kickstart Four-Day Visit appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: Janet Jackson Celebrates Diamond Birthday with a Star-Studded Bash as She Turns 60
results.description: Janet Jackson turns sixty today! Known to many as the Icon. Others refer to her as the Blueprint. A few less kind observers label her “Ms. Jackson,” and longtime fans still call her Michael’s little sister. Yet Janet possesses a presence strong enough to command attention from everyone. The youngest of the Jackson siblings marked ... Read more The post Janet Jackson Celebrates Diamond Birthday with a Star-Studded Bash as She Turns 60 appeared first on New York Beacon .
